INT. PRINCIPAL’S OFFICE - DAY29 29

EXT. SUPERMARKET PARKING LOT - SAME 95 95
Nance loads her groceries into the trunk. In front of her we

ANGLE ON: MARGIE DUNCAN, mid-30s as she briskly walks toward

We can HEAR HER BREATH CAUGHT IN HER THROAT as she walks up

MARGIE

What are you sorry now? You sorry?

Whore.

LILY
